description_long: This object is a stylized red crab with a smooth, glossy surface and exaggerated features. Its body is broad and rounded, with two large, prominent claws extending outward, each with a distinct pincer shape. The crab has eight slender walking legs, four on each side, splayed outward and downward from the main body. Two short, conical black eye stalks protrude from the top of the carapace, giving it a cartoonish appearance. The overall form is simplified, with minimal surface detail and a uniform red coloration except for the black eyes. The object appears solid and compact, resembling a playful or decorative representation of a crab.
description: A stylized, glossy red crab with large claws, eight legs, and two black eye stalks, featuring a smooth, rounded body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flat body, both large claws extended outward, and the two black eye stalks centered on top.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the left claw's size, the curvature of the walking legs, and the protruding eye stalks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the symmetrical arrangement of the legs and claws, with both eye stalks visible on the carapace.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizes the right claw, the splayed legs, and the smooth, rounded body shape.
